what_hurt: The agent exceeded the maximum allowed number of helpers (requested 3, max was 2), causing a runtime error/invalid response.

recommendation.reason: The core logic of the prompt is sound for a delegate task, but it needs a safety constraint to prevent the agent from requesting more helpers than the orchestration layer can handle.
